'''âzh-w-p-n''' ('''kazhawpenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monitor|monitor]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-w-p-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monitor|monitor]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-w-p-n
|-
! Lemma
| kazhawpenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhawpenoko|thizhawpenoko]] || [[word:jizhawpenoko|jizhawpenoko]] || [[word:shizhawpenoko|shizhawpenoko]] || [[word:kizhawpenoko|kizhawpenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhawpenoko|thuthuzhawpenoko]] || [[word:jujuzhawpenoko|jujuzhawpenoko]] || [[word:shushuzhawpenoko|shushuzhawpenoko]] || [[word:kukuzhawpenoko|kukuzhawpenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhawpenoko|thozhawpenoko]] || [[word:jozhawpenoko|jozhawpenoko]] || [[word:shozhawpenoko|shozhawpenoko]] || [[word:kozhawpenoko|kozhawpenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhawpenoko|thĂŠzhawpenoko]] || [[word:jĂŠzhawpenoko|jĂŠzhawpenoko]] || [[word:shĂŠzhawpenoko|shĂŠzhawpenoko]] || [[word:kĂŠzhawpenoko|kĂŠzhawpenoko]]

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhawpenoko|thazhawpenoko]] || [[word:jazhawpenoko|jazhawpenoko]] || [[word:shazhawpenoko|shazhawpenoko]] || [[word:kazhawpenoko|kazhawpenoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
